prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: consumable scroll icon set for Orbwalker inventory UI
Primary request: regenerate a 4x2 consumable icon sheet with true PNG transparency.
Subject: eight fantasy consumable scroll icons: fire, ice, earth, healing, armor ward, gold charm, reroll, emergency escape.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game icons, crisp readable silhouettes.
Composition/framing: 4 columns x 2 rows, evenly spaced icons, centered, no labels.
Constraints: output must be a 32-bit PNG with an actual alpha channel; all non-icon background pixels must be alpha 0 transparent.
Constraints: do not render any checkerboard or grid; do not render white, gray, or black background; do not render any rectangular backdrop or matte plate; do not fake transparency.
Avoid: no watermark, no logo, no readable text.
